textByHash.d6f009869207b8d8ca69c59ee2c59015baec0ff0: You ain't getting nuthin' off me, surface-dweller!
textByHash.3df061d897c505c53b50f182b13f8ce142120621: Well, first up there's the normal bone club and bone spear. Good, solid frog-bone, and the spear has an iron tip. Can withstand a lot of punishment, if you know what I mean!
textByHash.6ff7564b54bbd069b7558f15f0719283d93bdd20: But if you're after something a bit fancier, a bit more sophisticated, there's the bone crossbow and dagger.
textByHash.28c237e4ffb7e9206775f34b6b896b6f0985a73a: These are specially good for getting your prey unawares, but you're not going to get the best out of them unless you've been taught the special technique.
textByHash.0de04aa1e0b603d391c55564edfff1f699117333: Special aiming technique. If you hit an enemy with it their defence will get weaker so you can hit them again!
textByHash.8799a795512779debc4531ed311db249e241b938: Plus, if you use this technique on an enemy who isn't expecting it, you'll always hit them! Pretty good, eh?
textByHash.89071ec4ca2ebc225e9ee828d34ede4da6a77058: 'Course, there's only a few people who know it, so unless you can get someone to show you you won't be able to do it.
textByHash.c9e9d084a5b3bffa627373d09a18f5f374ab18ab: Good for you! So, are you interested?
textByHash.e8c626df44682f8f3fa4e2c1b2902eaa0be9a4d2: Yeah, you stay out of trouble.
textByHash.9e41942121da01ca241a75a0e89ddafcc2193c2f: Well, y'know, it's not the most reputable profession, is it? Selling weapons?
textByHash.2b82903009fc1a5286c1a5522fc1878a85ae45b3: Well, they're used to hurt people, aren't they? That's not considered very, y'know, respectable. Even though the guards use them, and the hunters, they're still considered a bit, y'know, dirty.
textByHash.d6e55b183c1724eb8366746ffa4ef4c6dde46d1f: Isn't it like that where you come from?
textByHash.6d39e0037aa3fbf2103bf3b172b25e432c4e73d3: I don't know, you surface people are strange!
